meaning: A step-by-step procedure for solving a problem or accomplishing a task.
A round fruit with red, green, or yellow skin and firm white flesh.
A formal request or a computer program designed for a specific purpose.
To make a formal request or to put something into operation.
To convert source code into machine code that a computer can execute.
To reduce the size or volume of something.
An electronic device for storing and processing data.
Facts and statistics collected for reference or analysis.
A structured set of data held in a computer.
A diagram showing the relation between variable quantities.
A function that converts input into a fixed-size string of bytes.
A specialized tree-based data structure that satisfies the heap property.
A point of connection in a network or data structure.
A word part added to the beginning of another word.
A linear data structure following First-In-First-Out (FIFO) order.
The base of a system of numeration; also refers to a type of tree structure.
To look for information or a specific item within a dataset.
A linear data structure following Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) order.
A hierarchical data structure with a root node and child nodes.
A tree-like data structure used for efficient retrieval of keys in a dataset of strings.
